name: Silver Wolf
desc: A member of the Stellaron Hunters and a genius hacker.\nShe sees the universe as a massive immersive simulation game and has fun with it.\nShe's mastered the skill known as "aether editing," which can be used to tamper with the data of reality.

1.name: Social Engineering
1.desc: After using her Ultimate to attack enemies, Silver Wolf regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy for every <u>debuff</u> that the target enemy currently has. This effect can be triggered up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s) in each use of her Ultimate.

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

2.name: Zombie Network
2.desc: When an enemy enters combat, reduces their Effect RES by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

3.name: Payload
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Bounce Attack
4.desc: After using her Ultimate to attack enemies, deals Quantum <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Silver Wolf's ATK for every <u>debuff</u> currently on the enemy target. This effect can be triggered for a maximum of <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s) during each use of her Ultimate.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

5.name: Brute Force Attack
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Overlay Network
6.desc: For every <u>debuff</u> the enemy target has, the DMG dealt by Silver Wolf to it increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, up to a max increase of <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

100601.name: System Warning
100601.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Silver Wolf's ATK to one designated enemy.
100601.simple_desc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one enemy.

100602.name: Allow Changes?
100602.desc:
There is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> to add 1 Weakness of an on-field character's Type to the target enemy. This also reduces the enemy's DMG RES to that Weakness Type by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). If the enemy already has that Type Weakness, the effect of DMG RES reduction to that Weakness Type will not be triggered.
Each enemy can only have 1 Weakness implanted by Silver Wolf. When Silver Wolf implants another Weakness to the target, only the most recent implanted Weakness will be kept.
In addition, there is a <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to further reduce the All-Type RES of the enemy by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[f1]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Silver Wolf's ATK to this enemy.
100602.simple_desc: There is a high chance to <color=#f29e38ff>apply additional Weakness</color> to one enemy and deals Quantum DMG to this enemy.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

100603.name: User Banned
100603.desc: There's a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> to decrease the target enemy's DEF by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s). And at the same time, deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Silver Wolf's ATK to the target enemy.
100603.simple_desc: There is a high chance of <color=#f29e38ff>lowering one enemy's DEF</color> and deals massive Quantum DMG to this enemy.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

100604.name: Awaiting System Response...
100604.desc: Silver Wolf can create three types of Bugs: Reduce ATK by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color>, reduce DEF by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>, and reduce SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color>.\nEvery time Silver Wolf attacks, she has a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> to implant a random Bug that lasts for <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> turn(s) in an enemy target.
100604.simple_desc: After this unit attacks, there is a chance of implanting the target with 1 random <color=#f29e38ff>Bug</color>.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

100606.name: Attack
100606.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

100607.name: Force Quit Program
100607.desc: Immediately attacks the enemy. After entering battle, deals Quantum DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Silver Wolf's ATK to all enemies, and ignores Weakness Types and reduces Toughness from all enemies. Enemies with their Weakness Broken in this way will trigger the Quantum Weakness Break effect.
100607.simple_desc: Attacks the enemy. After entering battle, deals minor DMG to all enemies and reduces Toughness of all enemies regardless of Weakness Types.

1.point_desc: The duration of "Bug" is extended by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Every time an enemy is inflicted with Weakness Break, Silver Wolf has a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> of implanting a random "Bug" on that target.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.point_desc: The duration of the Weakness implanted by Silver Wolf's Skill increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

If there are <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> or more <u>debuff(s)</u> affecting the enemy when the Skill is used, then the Skill decreases the enemy's All-Type RES by an additional <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

2.desc: When an enemy target enters combat, increases their DMG taken by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When an enemy target gets attacked by ally targets, Silver Wolf has a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to implant 1 random "Bug" on the attacked enemy target.

1100602.name: Allow Changes?
1100602.desc:
There is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> to add 1 Weakness of an on-field ally target's Type to one designated enemy target (prioritizing the implant of a Weakness that matches the first character in the team lineup). Each enemy target can only have 1 Weakness implanted by Silver Wolf. When Silver Wolf implants another Weakness to the target, only the most recent implanted Weakness will be retained.
In addition, there is a <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to further reduce the target's All-Type RES by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[f1]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Silver Wolf's ATK to this target.
1100602.simple_desc: There is a high chance to <color=#f29e38ff>apply an additional Weakness</color> to one enemy and deals Quantum DMG to this enemy.

At the same time, deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Silver Wolf's ATK to all enemies.
1100603.simple_desc: Has a high chance of reducing <color=#f29e38ff>all enemies'</color> DEF, and deals massive Quantum DMG to them.

30000001.name: Base Chance

1100604.name: Awaiting System Response...
1100604.desc: Silver Wolf can create three types of "Bugs": Reduce ATK by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color>, reduce DEF by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>, and reduce SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color>.\nAfter every attack launched by Silver Wolf, she has a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> to implant 1 random "Bug" that lasts for <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> turn(s) in the attacked enemy target. \nWhen the enemy target gets defeated, the Weakness Silver Wolf implanted on it will be transferred to another surviving enemy on the field that hasn't been implanted with Weakness by Silver Wolf, prioritizing targets at Elite-level and above.
1100604.simple_desc: After an attack, there is a chance of implanting 1 random <color=#f29e38ff>"Bug"</color> on the target. When this enemy target gets defeated, the implanted Weakness will be transferred.

1100607.simple_desc: Attacks the enemy. After entering combat, deals minor DMG to all enemies and reduces Toughness of all enemies regardless of Weakness Types.

1.point_desc: When the battle starts, immediately regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy. When Silver Wolf's turn starts, she regenerates <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Energy.
For every <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> Effect Hit Rate that Silver Wolf has, additionally increases her ATK by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, up to a max of <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.
